name: Red Velvet Cake (Hunt)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Very finely chopped Toasted Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend eggs, sugar, and cooking oil until light and fluffy.
2. Sift dry ingredients three times (important!).
3. Add one teaspoon vinegar to the buttermilk.
4. Add dry ingredients and milk alternately, beating for 3 minutes with an electric mixer.
5. Add red food coloring and vanilla.
6. Bake in two 8-inch or 9-inch pans at 375°F for about 35 minutes.
7. Let cool until very cold.
8. For the icing: Cream butter and cream cheese; add sugar slowly and beat after each addition. Mix in vanilla and nuts.
9. Spread icing on cooled cake.
